name: Octopus Renewables Infrastructure Trust PLC
summary: Octopus Renewables Infrastructure Trust PLC is a closed-ended investment company that invests in a diversified portfolio of renewable energy assets in the UK and Europe. The trust aims to provide investors with a sustainable income stream and capital growth by investing in solar, wind, and other renewable energy projects. Octopus Renewables Infrastructure Trust PLC is based in London, United Kingdom.
